constructor.details: Should be called with disable=true in deployments when it's accessed through a Proxy. Call this with disable=false during testing, when used without a proxy.

params.disable: Set to true to run `_disableInitializers()` inherited from openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/Initializable.sol

returns._0: The default parameters for deployed FPMMs

params.customOracleAdapter: The address of the custom oracle adapter contract
params.customOwner: The address of the custom owner
params.customParams: The custom parameters for the deployed FPMM
params.customProxyAdmin: The address of the custom proxy admin contract
params.fpmmImplementation: The address of the FPMM implementation
params.invertRateFeed: Wether to invert the rate feed so that the base is asset0 and quote is asset1
params.referenceRateFeedID: The address of the reference rate feed
params.token0: The address of the first token
params.token1: The address of the second token

returns._0: The address of the deployed FPMM proxy

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

returns._0: The address of the proxy admin contract

params.fpmmImplementation: The FPMM implementation address to register

returns._0: The list of registered FPMM implementations

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions anymore. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby removing any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params._defaultParams: The new default parameters for deployed FPMMs

params._oracleAdapter: The new address of the oracle adapter contract

params._proxyAdmin: The new address of the proxy admin contract

params.tokenA: The address of the first token
params.tokenB: The address of the second token

returns.token0: The address of the first token
returns.token1: The address of the second token

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

params.fpmmImplementation: The FPMM implementation address to unregister
params.index: The index of the FPMM implementation to unregister

defaultParams().notice: Gets the default parameters for deployed FPMMs.

deployFPMM(address,address,address,addre.notice: Deploys a new FPMM for a token pair using custom parameters.
Deploys a new FPMM for a token pair using the default parameters.

deployedFPMMAddresses().notice: Gets the list of deployed FPMM addresses.

getOrPrecomputeProxyAddress(address,addr.notice: Gets the precomputed or current proxy address for a token pair.

getPool(address,address).notice: Gets the address of the deployed FPMM for a token pair.

initialize(address,address,address,addre.notice: Initializes the factory with required addresses.

isPool(address).notice: Checks if a pool is a valid pool created by this factory.

isRegisteredImplementation(address).notice: Checks if a FPMM implementation is registered.

oracleAdapter().notice: Gets the address of the oracle adapter contract.

proxyAdmin().notice: Gets the address of the proxy admin contract.

registerFPMMImplementation(address).notice: Registers a new FPMM implementation address.

registeredImplementations().notice: Gets the list of registered FPMM implementations.

setDefaultParams((uint256,uint256,addres.notice: Sets the default parameters for deployed FPMMs.

setOracleAdapter(address).notice: Sets the address of the oracle adapter contract.

setProxyAdmin(address).notice: Sets the address of the proxy admin contract.

sortTokens(address,address).notice: Sorts two tokens by their address value.
